hypothesis: If universal machine learning interatomic potentials (including a fine-tuned model) applied to a diverse MOF and nanoporous dataset can reproduce DFT-reference results for structural optimization (convergence and lattice volumes), MD stability (volume changes in NpT at 300 K and 1 bar), bulk modulus from Birch–Murnaghan EOS under ±4% strain, and heat capacity at 300 K, then these MLIPs enable accurate MOF molecular modeling.
